overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city plaza at night. The scene features the iconic MILITECH corporate tower, large holographic advertisements including a giant koi fish, and scattered pedestrians in a high-tech urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza entrance with wide staircase

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and transitions onto flat plaza surface
camera stops ascending and continues forward at level elevation

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian character up the wide concrete stairs toward the MILITECH tower, then proceeding onto the plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking up the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive dark corporate skyscraper with illuminated MILITECH signage and red horizontal accent lighting
giant orange and gold holographic koi fish swimming slowly in the air
large translucent blue holographic jellyfish-like creature floating near the buildings
wide staircase with integrated blue neon lighting along the edges
tall building facade covered in bright digital advertisements and signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character ascending wide concrete stairs toward the imposing MILITECH tower. Giant holographic advertisements including an orange koi fish and blue jellyfish creature float in the air. The environment is bathed in neon light from surrounding digital billboards. Around 8 seconds, the character reaches the top of the stairs and transitions onto the flat plaza surface, continuing forward through the sparse crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian promenade with digital advertising kiosks

events.description: digital advertisement kiosks become prominent along the right side of the walkway
water feature with blue lighting becomes visible on the right side of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza, navigating around other pedestrians and passing digital advertisement stands

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking in the same direction alongside the camera

entered.detail: tall standalone digital billboard displaying rotating advertisements including one for DARRA
concrete seating areas with yellow trim along the right side of the walkway
reflective pool or canal with blue accent lighting and small plants

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the flat concrete plaza, passing by digital advertisement kiosks on the right displaying various commercials. The blue holographic jellyfish exits the frame as the camera moves forward. The crowd density increases slightly with pedestrians walking in mixed directions. Around 28 seconds, a water feature with blue lighting becomes visible on the right, and the MILITECH tower shifts to the left side of the frame as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with water features and scattered seating

events.description: slight left turn while continuing forward to navigate around pedestrians
passing by stairs leading down to the water feature on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing through the open plaza area, navigating around scattered pedestrians and approaching the MILITECH building entrance

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with distinctive red glowing facade and signage
staircase leading down to the water feature level with blue lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through a more open section of the plaza with the water feature now prominent on the right. The MILITECH tower remains the focal point ahead while the holographic koi fish continues swimming on the left. The camera makes slight turns to navigate around pedestrians. A red illuminated building becomes visible on the left, and the character approaches stairs leading down to the water feature as the video concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit corporate plaza that transitions from a steep ascent toward a towering skyscraper into a wide, open urban promenade. It begins with a third-person view following a character up wide concrete stairs toward the imposing MILITECH tower, surrounded by floating holographic koi fish and blue jellyfish. As the character reaches the top of the stairs, the scene opens onto a flat concrete plaza where the camera passes digital advertisement kiosks and a growing crowd of pedestrians. The perspective then shifts as the MILITECH tower moves to the left of the frame, making way for a blue-lit water feature that emerges on the right. Finally, the camera navigates through the open plaza past a red illuminated building, continuing toward the water feature as the holographic koi fish swims alongside the path.
